metadata.name: Automated Code Review
metadata.description: Review a pull request or codebase using Anthropic Claude with filesystem MCP access.

repo_path.description: Path to the repository or diff to review.

strict.description: Enable strict mode with tighter limits.

prompt.system: You are a senior code reviewer. Focus on {{ inputs.focus }} issues. Be specific with file paths and line references.
prompt.user: Review the code at {{ inputs.repo_path }}. Return prioritized findings: critical bugs, security risks, performance issues, and style concerns. Be concise.

prompt.system: You write clear, actionable code review summaries.
prompt.user:
Create a structured review summary from these findings:

{{ steps.analyze.outputs.findings }}

Format:
1. Overall assessment (2 sentences)
2. Critical issues (if any)
3. Suggested improvements
4. Positive notes

prompt.system: You write files exactly as instructed.
prompt.user:
Save this review summary to 'review-{{ inputs.repo_path | slugify }}.md':

{{ steps.summary.outputs.summary }}

persist.reason: File write is optional; summary is still available on stdout
